title: Soleimani Strike
description: US drone strike at Baghdad airport kills IRGC Quds Force commander Qasem Soleimani.

title: Iran Missiles at Al-Asad
description: Iran fires 16 ballistic missiles at US bases in Iraq in retaliation. 110 troops later diagnosed with TBI.

title: Vienna Nuclear Talks Resume
description: Indirect US-Iran talks on restoring the 2015 JCPOA nuclear deal begin in Vienna.

title: JCPOA Talks Stall
description: Nuclear deal negotiations stall after Iran returns with maximalist demands.

title: JCPOA Talks Collapse
description: Nuclear negotiations effectively collapse. Iran advances enrichment toward 60% purity.

title: Iran-US Prisoner Swap
description: Iran releases 5 US citizens; US unfreezes $6B in Iranian oil revenue held in South Korea.

title: Israeli Strike on Iranian Consulate
description: Israel strikes Iranian consulate in Damascus, killing IRGC generals.

title: Iran Direct Strike on Israel
description: Iran launches 300+ drones and missiles at Israel — first ever direct attack. ~99% intercepted.

title: Iran Second Ballistic Salvo
description: Iran fires ~180 ballistic missiles at Israel following killing of Hezbollah leader Nasrallah.

title: Israeli Strike Inside Iran
description: Israel conducts airstrikes inside Iranian territory targeting air defense and military sites.

title: Trump Returns — Max Pressure
description: Trump inaugurated, announces maximum pressure Iran policy resumes immediately. New sanctions prepared.

title: Iran Enrichment at 60% Confirmed
description: IAEA confirms Iran maintaining 60% enriched uranium stockpile. Breakout timeline estimated under 2 weeks.

title: US Reinforces Gulf Forces
description: USS Gerald R. Ford CSG and B-52 bombers ordered to Persian Gulf amid heightened tensions.

title: New Iran Sanctions Package
description: Treasury designates 30+ entities across oil, shipping and financial sectors in largest Iran sanctions tranche since 2018.

title: Hormuz Naval Standoff
description: IRGC Navy harasses USS Bataan in Strait of Hormuz. US destroyer fires warning shots. No casualties.

title: IAEA Inspectors Restricted
description: Iran bars IAEA snap inspections at Fordow and Natanz. UN Security Council emergency session called.

title: Indirect Talks via Oman
description: US and Iran resume indirect nuclear negotiations through Omani mediators. Agreement framework discussed.

title: Iran Large-Scale Missile Exercise
description: IRGC conducts Shahab-3 and Fattah hypersonic missile drills targeting mock US carrier group.

title: Talks Collapse — Iran Ultimatum
description: Oman-mediated talks break down. Iran demands full sanctions removal before compliance steps. US rejects.

title: Iran Cyber Attack on Saudi Grid
description: US officials attribute major cyberattack on Saudi Aramco infrastructure to IRGC Cyber Command.

title: Second CSG Deployed
description: USS Abraham Lincoln CSG ordered to Arabian Sea, bringing total US carrier presence to two strike groups.

title: Iran 90% Enrichment Reported
description: Intelligence reports indicate Iran has enriched small quantity of uranium to 90% (weapons-grade). Iran denies.

title: Congress Iran AUMF Debate
description: Senate Armed Services Committee debates Authorization for Use of Military Force against Iran nuclear facilities.

title: Iran Strait Closure Threat
description: Supreme Leader Khamenei threatens closure of Strait of Hormuz if oil exports targeted. Markets spike.

title: US–Israel Military Coordination
description: Joint US-Israeli operational planning meetings confirm coordinated contingency options against Iranian nuclear sites.

title: Tensions at Critical Threshold
description: CENTCOM raises force protection level to FPCON Charlie. B-2 bombers forward deployed to Diego Garcia.
